infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HandyGo needs your location to show nearby jobs and provide navigation to job sites.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HandyGo uses your location in the background to update your availability and match you with nearby jobs.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HandyGo needs camera access to take photos of completed work.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HandyGo needs photo library access to upload job completion photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HandyGo uses your location to match you with nearby maintenance jobs and provide navigation.

plugins.photosPermission: HandyGo needs access to your photos to upload job completion images.
plugins.cameraPermission: HandyGo needs camera access to take photos of completed work.
